# User Intent Brief

## User Intent
- 把这组 X 帖子离线证据包转成一份 source-faithful evidence readout。
- Keep it useful for deciding what the post itself actually says before broader verification.

## Hard Constraints
- Separate `main post text`, `thread text`, and `image evidence`.
- Separate `confirmed from the post itself` from `not yet confirmed externally`.
- Keep the extraction method visible.

## Non-goals
- Do not merge image OCR into the main post text.
- Do not treat a social claim as externally confirmed without stronger support.
